amendment.description: To protect women and girls in athletics.

action.text: Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Cloture motion on amendment SA 4421, to the motion to concur in the House message to accompany S. 1383 with amendment SA 4420, presented in Senate.
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Considered by Senate (Message from the House considered).
Amendment SA 4421 proposed by Senator Thune for Senator Tuberville to Amendment SA 4420.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 4421 proposed by Senator Thune for Senator Tuberville to Amendment SA 4420.
